name: portfolio-webpage
description: Personal developer portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and experience.

scripts.test: cross-env LOG_LEVEL=error MONGODB_CONNECTION_STRING=mongodb://127.0.0.1:50000/portfolio-webpage?retryWrites=false c8 --reporter html --reporter text-summary mocha 'tests/**/*.test.js' --ignore 'tests/**/common.js' --ignore 'tests/helpers/**' --timeout 10000 --exit

author: Kofler Phillip
